title: ChatGPT
description:
Versatile AI assistant for writing, research, coding, and image generation.
Powers creative and everyday tasks with GPT models.

title: Claude
description:
Advanced AI for long-form writing, complex reasoning, and code.
Known for safety, nuance, and handling large contexts.

title: Gemini
description:
Google's multimodal AI integrated with Search and Workspace.
Excellent for research, images, and productivity in Google ecosystem.

title: Grok
description:
Truth-seeking AI from xAI with real-time knowledge and humor.
Built for maximum curiosity and helpfulness.

title: Midjourney
description:
Leading AI art generator for stunning, artistic images.
Creates high-quality visuals from text prompts via Discord.

title: Perplexity
description:
AI-powered search engine with real-time answers and sources.
Combines chat with accurate web research.

title: ElevenLabs
description:
Ultra-realistic AI voice synthesis and cloning.
Perfect for podcasts, videos, and narration.

title: Notion AI
description:
AI assistant built into Notion for notes, wikis, and tasks.
Summarizes, generates, and organizes your workspace.
